result.stdout:
Protokeeper tool
    Usage:
        protokeep --help | -H
        protokeep --version | -V
        protokeep <ProtokeepFileName> COMMAND [-ns | --namespace namespace] [-o | --output] outputFile [--update-commons | --update-commons-in commonsFile] 
    Commands:
        check - check if it is possible to lock given protokeep types
        lock - lock given protokeep types, an error is raised if evolution is not possible
        proto - generate protobuf description: proto [-o|--output] outputFile
        fsharp-types - generate fsharp type
        fsharp-proto - generate converters between protobuf classes and fsharp types
        fsharp-json - generate converters between json and fsharp types
        fsharp-mongo - generate serializers for Mongo Driver
        fsharp-fable - generate converters between json and fsharp types in fable environment
